completed: Fixed Co-Curricular API 400 Bad Request by standardizing departmentId handling
Enhanced CoCurricular UI with department selector for Admin and auto-detection for HoD
Implemented filtered coordinator selection based on department scope
Hardened co-curricular controllers with robust department scope guards
pending: Resolve MongoDB Change Stream dependency for standalone instances
Verify end-to-end clearance flow with actual coordinators

decisions.context: Co-curricular items required departmentId but frontend was not sending it, and HoDs were forced to select it manually.
decisions.decision: Inferred departmentId from req.user on backend for HoDs and added explicit selector for Admin on frontend.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds one extra API call (getDepartments) for Admins on the co-curricular page.

blockers: MongoDB standalone deployment causes errors with $changeStream; needs replica set or refactoring
